name_en: 🌷Style 735145. The new GG brand series continues the design philosophy that items should not just be trendy for a season, but timeless. The classic interlocking letter element, derived from the initials of Guccio Gucci, continues to infuse brand identity charm into new designs. This Ophidia series small handbag features historic GG Supreme canvas with double G hardware.
name_cn:
🌷Style 735145. The new GG brand series continues the design philosophy that items should not just be trendy for a season, but timeless. The classic interlocking letter element, derived from the initials of Guccio Gucci, continues to infuse brand identity charm into new designs. This Ophidia series small handbag features historic GG Supreme canvas with double G hardware.
Hidden Details
Beige and wood GG Supreme canvas
Brown leather trim
Double G
Adjustable top handle
Top zip closure
Made in Italy
